working_on: Settle OQ-PRIVACY-A (erasure mechanism) as hard-delete-with-cascade and withdraw OQ-PRIVACY-B (institutional vs individual regime); land ADR 0031. Both simplifications enabled by an exploration-session commitment to ship Paideia as a single-platform iOS App Store consumer app with no institutional regime, no BYOK, no enterprise wrapper, no acquisition-exit path. The supersession ADR that formalizes that commitment (retiring ADR 0002, rewriting business.md and MISSION.md) is queued for S-0012 next session.
outcome_summary: Phase 1 substantively closes. ADR 0031 settles OQ-PRIVACY-A as hard-delete-with-cascade (ON DELETE CASCADE FK discipline across learner_events / mastery_snapshots / tension_log; satisfies App Store guideline 5.1.1 at the schema level) and withdraws OQ-PRIVACY-B as moot — no institutional regime to design for; cohort_id removed from ADR 0026 sub-decision (2)'s learner_events.context column shape (surviving: path_id, source_text_id, session_id). Two rejected candidates recorded: crypto-shredding (KMS keys earn their keep only with audit-trail-preserving erasure contractual requirements the project no longer pursues) and anonymize-and-aggregate (graph-level signal contribution from a single user's events negligible at consumer scale; sparsity makes residuals re-identifiable). The simplification was enabled by a project-direction shift settled in S-0011 conversation: single-platform iOS App Store consumer subscription at cost price (~$12.99/mo target, no free tier), no BYOK, no institutional regime, no grants, no 501(c)(3), no acquisition exit; static-polish-only / dynamic-features-foreclosed maintenance posture; refusal-not-deferral on business expansion. 'Leave the option open' identified as the corruption vector. Success criterion: 'an app I would pay for if it weren't mine'. Supersession ADR (0032) queued for S-0012, retiring ADR 0002 and substantially rewriting business.md / MISSION.md / ROADMAP Phase 4.5/8/9 / architecture.md institutional provisions / tensions.md OQ-BYOK-REGIME. STATE.md, docs/tensions.md, adr/README.md, docs/CROSS_REFERENCES.md, CHANGELOG.md updated. tools/validate.py clean: 0 hard-fails, 0 soft-warns.
